title: create_transaction_atomic_and_stock_update
description: Test the POST /api/v1/transactions endpoint to ensure that transactions are created atomically, stock levels are decremented correctly, and historical transaction data is recorded for forecasting.

title: list_transactions_for_store
description: Test the GET /api/v1/transactions endpoint to verify that it returns a list of transactions filtered by store_id with correct transaction details.

title: create_product_and_retrieve_details
description: Test the POST /api/v1/products endpoint to create a new product and then GET /api/v1/products/{product_id} to retrieve and verify the product details.

title: update_nonexistent_product_returns_404
description: Test the PATCH /api/v1/products/{nonexistent_product_id} endpoint to ensure it returns a 404 Not Found error when attempting to update a product that does not exist.

title: filter_products_by_category_and_stock
description: Test the GET /api/v1/products endpoint with query parameters category and stock_lt to verify that it returns products filtered by category and stock threshold.

title: create_event_and_list_events
description: Test the POST /api/v1/events endpoint to create a calendar event and then GET /api/v1/events to verify the event is listed with correct details.

title: event_creation_validation_error
description: Test the POST /api/v1/events endpoint with missing required fields to verify that it returns a 400 validation error.

title: calibrate_event_and_verify_calibrated_flag
description: Test the POST /api/v1/events/{event_id}/calibrate endpoint to apply calibration parameters and then GET /api/v1/events to verify the event shows a calibrated flag.

title: get_dashboard_metrics_for_date_range
description: Test the GET /api/v1/dashboard/metrics endpoint with a valid date range to verify it returns aggregated sales and performance metrics.

title: get_sales_chart_with_invalid_date_range
description: Test the GET /api/v1/dashboard/sales-chart endpoint with an invalid date range to verify it returns a 400 error indicating invalid date range.
